appDesc.message: Manages Menlo Security redirection based on VPN policy.

popupDesc.message: When VPN policy is active, redirects URLs not auto-redirected to Menlo Security.

forceMenloListTitle.description: Title for the force menlo list

newUrlInputPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the new URL input

openWithMenloBtn.description: Button to immediately open the current page via Menlo Security.

urlAlreadyExists.message: This URL is already in the list.
urlAlreadyExists.description: Error message when adding a duplicate URL

urlFormatInvalid.description: Error message for invalid URL format

urlCannotRedirect.description: Error when the current page is not a redirectable URL (e.g. settings page).

popupDescGlobal.message: Automatically manages Menlo redirection based on VPN policy. URLs below are always routed through Menlo when the policy is active.

popupDescIvanti.message: Manually control Menlo Security redirection. Toggle the extension on/off and manage URLs routed through Menlo.

ivantiToggleLabel.description: Label for the Ivanti enable/disable toggle

forceMenloListDescGlobal.message: These URLs are always routed through Menlo when the policy is active.
forceMenloListDescGlobal.description: Force list description for Global mode

forceMenloListDescIvanti.message: When enabled, these URLs are always routed through Menlo.
forceMenloListDescIvanti.description: Force list description for Ivanti mode
